options.name: Zippy Zappers
options.flavourText: Shoes that shock your feet into overdrive.
options.imageDesc: electric blue and white sprinting cleats with lightning bolt designs crackling around the soles
options.colors: electric blue, white, and yellow lightning streaks

options.name: Turbo Tods
options.flavourText: Allegedly the shoes of ancient speed demons.
options.imageDesc: scuffed red racing cleats with tiny turbo stickers peeling off
options.colors: faded red with black accents and metallic silver stripes

options.name: Rocket Runners
options.flavourText: Not actual rockets, but they feel like it.
options.imageDesc: sleek silver and black cleats with rocket ship silhouettes on the sides
options.colors: silver, black, and neon orange flame accents

options.name: Whoosh Wedges
options.flavourText: Makes you sound faster even if you aren't.
options.imageDesc: lime green cleats with aerodynamic wedge designs and sound wave patterns
options.colors: lime green, white, and electric blue waves

options.name: Zephyr Kicks
options.flavourText: Channeling the ancient spirit of wind itself.
options.imageDesc: flowing pale blue and white cleats with swirling cloud patterns
options.colors: pale blue, white, and translucent silver

options.name: Blast Boots
options.flavourText: They leave a dust cloud behind. Probably.
options.imageDesc: tan and orange cleats with explosive starburst designs and dust effect prints
options.colors: tan, burnt orange, and gold glitter accents

options.name: Velocity Vines
options.flavourText: Fast plants? No. Fast feet? Yes.
options.imageDesc: green and purple cleats with tangled vine patterns racing down the sides
options.colors: forest green, purple, and neon lime streaks

options.name: Sprint Sprites
options.flavourText: Tiny magical creatures trapped in your soles.
options.imageDesc: iridescent pastel cleats with sparkle effects and tiny sprite wings embroidered
options.colors: pastel purple, pink, and holographic silver

options.name: Dash Dazzlers
options.flavourText: So shiny you'll be hard to tackle.
options.imageDesc: chrome and neon pink cleats covered in mirror-like disco ball patterns
options.colors: chrome silver, hot pink, and rainbow sparkle

options.name: Swift Slippers
options.flavourText: Whoever named these was bad at gear names.
options.imageDesc: gray and neon yellow cleats designed to look like fuzzy slippers with cleats bolted on
options.colors: soft gray, neon yellow, and white fuzzy trim

options.name: Iron Stompers
options.flavourText: Heavy enough to crush your hopes and dreams.
options.imageDesc: bulky dark gray and black cleats with reinforced metal plating and rivets
options.colors: charcoal gray, gunmetal black, and silver reinforcements

options.name: Brute Blasters
options.flavourText: For kicking things REALLY hard.
options.imageDesc: thick-soled red and black cleats with exaggerated bumper reinforcements
options.colors: deep red, black, and gold metallic edges

options.name: Tank Treads
options.flavourText: Walk softly and carry a massive stick.
options.imageDesc: oversized olive green cleats with tread pattern treads like tank treads
options.colors: olive green, dark brown, and rust orange

options.name: Sledge Shoes
options.flavourText: Perfect for sledgehammering the ball.
options.imageDesc: brown and purple cleats with a flat sledge-hammer shaped reinforcement on the toe
options.colors: brown, deep purple, and metallic bronze

options.name: Mammoth Mallets
options.flavourText: Beast mode: activated.
options.imageDesc: huge bone-colored cleats with mammoth fur patterns and hefty mallet-shaped reinforcements
options.colors: cream, brown, and ivory with tusks details

options.name: Crush Clompers
options.flavourText: Stomps with the fury of ancient beasts.
options.imageDesc: oversized burgundy and black cleats with claw-like tread patterns on the soles
options.colors: burgundy, black, and deep crimson

options.name: Power Pegs
options.flavourText: Wooden pegs driven into the ground. Ouch.
options.imageDesc: wooden and tan cleats designed like oversized wooden pegs with metal reinforcements
options.colors: natural wood tan, dark brown, and iron gray

options.name: Anvil Ankles
options.flavourText: Your feet weigh as much as an anvil.
options.imageDesc: solid gray cleats shaped like tiny anvils with deep ridged soles
options.colors: anvil gray, charcoal, and metallic silver highlights

options.name: Ramming Runners
options.flavourText: Why pass when you can bulldoze everyone?
options.imageDesc: reinforced teal and black cleats with a bulging ram-horn shape on the heel
options.colors: teal, black, and metallic gold horns

options.name: Fortress Feet
options.flavourText: Immovable object meets ball.
options.imageDesc: castle-like gray and white cleats with brick pattern designs and tower-shaped toe box
options.colors: stone gray, cream white, and shadow black mortar lines

options.name: Thread Throwers
options.flavourText: Passes tighter than knitted socks.
options.imageDesc: white and blue cleats with intricate thread and knit patterns woven into the design
options.colors: white, royal blue, and silver threading accents

options.name: Compass Kicks
options.flavourText: Always points your ball in the right direction.
options.imageDesc: gold and navy cleats with compass rose designs and directional arrows on the soles
options.colors: gold, navy blue, and white compass markings

options.name: Precision Pumps
options.flavourText: Each kick is mathematically perfect.
options.imageDesc: mint green and black cleats with geometric grid patterns and grid lines
options.colors: mint green, black, and silver geometric lines

options.name: Arrow Arcs
options.flavourText: The ball follows where you point.
options.imageDesc: teal and yellow cleats with swooping arrow designs racing down the sides
options.colors: teal, bright yellow, and white arrow streaks

options.name: Laser Laces
options.flavourText: Laces that guide your passes with precision.
options.imageDesc: black cleats with glowing red laser-line patterns on the laces and across the toe
options.colors: black, neon red, and electric blue accents

options.name: Silk Sliders
options.flavourText: Smooth passes delivered on silk pillows.
options.imageDesc: rose gold and blush pink cleats with silky sheen and delicate curved patterns
options.colors: rose gold, blush pink, and pearl white

options.name: Guide Gears
options.flavourText: Your feet are tiny intelligent machines.
options.imageDesc: bronze and orange cleats with interlocking gear patterns on every surface
options.colors: bronze, burnt orange, and metallic copper

options.name: Portal Peepers
options.flavourText: Ball teleports wherever you want it.
options.imageDesc: purple and green cleats with portal-like circular swirl patterns on the soles
options.colors: deep purple, lime green, and magenta vortex effects

options.name: Navigator Nines
options.flavourText: Nine times out of nine, it's perfect.
options.imageDesc: navy cleats with numbered circular patterns and directional path designs
options.colors: navy blue, gold numbers, and silver directional lines

options.name: Homing Hearts
options.flavourText: The ball loves where you send it.
options.imageDesc: pink and red cleats with heart shapes that form trailing path patterns
options.colors: hot pink, red, and white heart trails with gold accents

options.name: Cannon Cleats
options.flavourText: Your foot is literally a cannon now.
options.imageDesc: black and red cleats with cannon barrel shapes protruding from the toe and sides
options.colors: black, crimson red, and metallic bronze cannons

options.name: Sniper Slicks
options.flavourText: Headshot the goal from anywhere.
options.imageDesc: gray and neon green cleats with crosshair and targeting reticle patterns
options.colors: gunmetal gray, neon green, and white crosshairs

options.name: Impact Infernos
options.flavourText: Goals explode into flames.
options.imageDesc: orange and yellow cleats with flame designs erupting from the kick zone
options.colors: orange, yellow, and red flame gradients with black shadows

options.name: Blast Bolts
options.flavourText: Kicks that pack a thunderous punch.
options.imageDesc: white and purple cleats with lightning bolt patterns concentrated at the toe
options.colors: white, royal purple, and electric yellow lightning

options.name: Shatter Shoes
options.flavourText: Goals shatter on impact.
options.imageDesc: crystal white and light blue cleats with crackle and shatter patterns across the surface
options.colors: crystal white, light blue, and silver crackling effects

options.name: Rocket Rampage
options.flavourText: Takes off faster than a actual rocket.
options.imageDesc: red and silver cleats with rocket fins and exhaust flame designs on the heel
options.colors: rocket red, silver, and orange exhaust flames

options.name: Comet Crushers
options.flavourText: Faster and more destructive than meteors.
options.imageDesc: dark purple and white cleats with comet tail streak patterns and cosmic dust
options.colors: dark purple, white, and golden comet trails

options.name: Sonic Strikes
options.flavourText: The ball breaks the sound barrier.
options.imageDesc: bright blue and white cleats with sound wave rings radiating from the toe
options.colors: bright blue, white, and neon pink sound waves

options.name: Meteor Mules
options.flavourText: Kicks hit like falling space rocks.
options.imageDesc: gray and black cleats with impact crater textures and meteor scorch marks
options.colors: dark gray, charcoal black, and burnt orange scorch

options.name: Volley Vortex
options.flavourText: Spinning tornado of destruction.
options.imageDesc: green and white cleats with swirling vortex patterns centered on the striking zone
options.colors: green, white, and gray swirling vortex effects

options.name: Feather Feet
options.flavourText: Light as air, quick as thought.
options.imageDesc: white and pale blue cleats designed to look feather-light with feather patterns embroidered
options.colors: white, pale blue, and silver feather accents

options.name: Twitch Kicks
options.flavourText: Your muscles react before your brain does.
options.imageDesc: neon pink and white cleats with motion blur lines and nervous system patterns
options.colors: neon pink, white, and electric blue neural patterns

options.name: Whip Whispers
options.flavourText: Snappy kicks that crack the sound barrier.
options.imageDesc: black and tan cleats with whip-like curved designs and snap marks on the surface
options.colors: black, tan leather, and metallic gold accents

options.name: Butterfly Booties
options.flavourText: Fluttery feet that dodge everything.
options.imageDesc: iridescent purple and teal cleats with delicate butterfly wing patterns
options.colors: iridescent purple, teal, and holographic shimmer

options.name: Dart Dancers
options.flavourText: Ping-pong across the pitch in a heartbeat.
options.imageDesc: red and white cleats with dart board patterns and zigzag movement designs
options.colors: red, white, and black dart board rings

options.name: Instant Insoles
options.flavourText: Appears wherever you need to be instantly.
options.imageDesc: metallic silver cleats with warp portal and teleportation circle designs
options.colors: metallic silver, cyan blue, and neon purple warp effects

options.name: Ninja Neons
options.flavourText: Silent, deadly, and glowing for some reason.
options.imageDesc: black cleats with neon pink and neon green ninja star and shadow patterns
options.colors: black, neon pink, and neon green with purple shadows

options.name: Spring Steppers
options.flavourText: Bounce back faster than a rubber ball.
options.imageDesc: bright yellow and blue cleats with spring coil designs winding around the sides
options.colors: bright yellow, royal blue, and metallic silver springs

options.name: Quicksilver Quicks
options.flavourText: Moves like liquid mercury given feet.
options.imageDesc: silver and gray cleats with flowing liquid metal patterns and fluid designs
options.colors: silver, mercury gray, and metallic copper flows

options.name: Snap Snap Shoes
options.flavourText: Snaps into position before the ball arrives.
options.imageDesc: orange and black cleats with snap/clasp designs and fast-motion blur effects
options.colors: orange, black, and white motion blur streaks

options.name: Lucky Lotto Kicks
options.flavourText: Somehow the ball just goes in.
options.imageDesc: gold and red cleats with lottery ticket designs and lucky number patterns all over
options.colors: gold, crimson red, and white lottery numbers

options.name: Clover Climbers
options.flavourText: Four-leaf clover power embedded in rubber.
options.imageDesc: green cleats with four-leaf clover patterns repeating across the surface and shamrock symbols
options.colors: forest green, lime green, and gold clover accents

options.name: Rainbow Runners
options.flavourText: The luck pot follows your feet.
options.imageDesc: multi-colored gradient cleats with rainbow arcs and pot-of-gold symbols
options.colors: rainbow gradient with gold accents

options.name: Chance Chargers
options.flavourText: Probability bends in your favor.
options.imageDesc: purple and silver cleats with dice patterns and probability symbols scattered around
options.colors: royal purple, silver, and white dice and symbols

options.name: Mystic Moccasins
options.flavourText: Touched by forces beyond comprehension.
options.imageDesc: indigo and white cleats with mystical symbols, moons, and stars embroidered
options.colors: indigo, white, and silver mystical markings

options.name: Karma Kicks
options.flavourText: The universe rewards your footwork.
options.imageDesc: zen orange and white cleats with yin-yang designs and karma symbol patterns
options.colors: burnt orange, white, and black yin-yang designs

options.name: Fortune Flippers
options.flavourText: Coin flips always land in your favor.
options.imageDesc: gold and copper cleats with coin flip and fortune wheel designs spinning around
options.colors: gold, copper, and bronze fortune wheel patterns

options.name: Blessed Bootees
options.flavourText: Blessed by literally everyone including the referee.
options.imageDesc: white and gold cleats with holy halo designs and angelic feather patterns
options.colors: pure white, holy gold, and silver halos

options.name: Jinx Jammers
options.flavourText: Bad luck for opponents only.
options.imageDesc: black and red cleats with crossed skull designs that somehow look cute
options.colors: black, dark red, and silver skull and crossbone accents

options.name: Fate Finders
options.flavourText: Destiny is literally inside your shoes.
options.imageDesc: deep blue and purple cleats with constellation patterns and destiny rune designs
options.colors: deep blue, purple, and golden constellation lines
